experience: Hands-on exposure to Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Generative AI, NLP , predictive analytics, and intelligent product development. Work closely with AI, Product, Engineering, and Analytics teams on live AI-powered products and data-driven business solutions. Assist in building and training Machine Learning models. Work on AI/ML-based business use cases and intelligent systems. Perform data preprocessing, feature engineering, and model optimization. Analyze structured and unstructured datasets for insights. Support development of predictive and recommendation models. Work on NLP and Generative AI-related projects. Assist in model evaluation, testing, and deployment workflows. Collaborate with engineering teams for AI integration into products. Good analytical and problem-solving abilities. Participation in Kaggle, research, or AI competitions is preferred.
general: Internship Opportunity: Data Scientist / ML Engineer Intern. Position: Data Scientist / ML Engineer Intern. Department: AI / Machine Learning / Data Science. Location: Indore / Mumbai. Internship Duration: 3–6 Months. PPO Opportunity: Yes – Based on Performance. Eligible students pursuing B.Tech / M.Tech in Computer Science / AI-ML / Data Science / Statistics from IITs, NITs, IISERs, and Top Engineering Institutes. AI automation Scalable ML pipeline development Strong analytical and research-oriented mindset. Passion for AI, ML, and emerging technologies. Curiosity to solve real-world business problems using AI. Quick learner with experimentation mindset. Good communication and collaboration skills. Exposure to modern AI technologies and scalable ML systems.
